course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #11 - Building a Barn — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #11 - Building a Barn" — 5 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 12

lesson.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #11 - Building a Barn — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Today I decided to build a **barn** for my animals. I gathered lots of oak wood and **planks** to create the frame. The barn needed to be big enough for cows, sheep, and chickens.

I started by placing the **foundation** using cobblestone blocks. Then I built the walls with oak planks and added large **windows** to let natural light inside for the animals.

The roof was the hardest part. I used **stairs** blocks to create a sloped design that looked realistic. I also added hay bales inside for **decoration** and for feeding the animals.

Next, I needed to **lure** the animals into the barn using their favorite foods. Cows follow wheat, sheep follow wheat too, and chickens follow **seeds**. I led them one group at a time.

Finally, the barn was complete with all my animals safely inside. I added a fence gate as the **entrance** so they couldn't escape. This barn will help me **breed** animals for food and resources.
lesson.transcript_zh:
今天我决定为动物建造一个谷仓。我收集了很多橡木和木板来制作框架。谷仓需要足够大来容纳牛、羊和鸡。

我先用圆石方块铺设地基。然后用橡木板建造墙壁，并加了大窗户让自然光照进来给动物。

屋顶是最难的部分。我用楼梯方块创造了一个看起来逼真的斜坡设计。我还在里面放了干草块作为装饰和喂养动物。

接下来，我需要用动物最喜欢的食物把它们引诱进谷仓。牛跟着小麦走，羊也跟着小麦走，鸡跟着种子走。我一组一组地带它们进去。

最后，谷仓完工了，所有动物都安全地在里面。我加了一个栅栏门作为入口这样它们跑不出去。这个谷仓将帮助我繁殖动物来获取食物和资源。

question.prompt: Why did the player build a barn?

options: To keep animals safe and breed them for resources
